proven.claim: Proven: "--llm-signals" is documented in help (line 559) and consumed by
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 559
; Proven: "--llm-signals" is documented in help (line 559) and consumed by
; args.includes("--llm-signals") in buildSignalRegistry, which registers LLMSignalGenerator.
(declare-const llmsignals_documented Int)
(declare-const llmsignals_consumed Int)
(assert (= llmsignals_documented 1))
; if (args.includes("--llm-signals")) { registry.register(new LLMSignalGenerator(...)); }
(assert (= llmsignals_consumed 1))
(assert (not (= llmsignals_documented llmsignals_consumed)))
(check-sat)
; Expected: unsat — --llm-signals is documented and enables signal generation
